name: Breakfast Scones
recipeInstructions: Sift together the flour and baking powder, salt, and sugar. Rub in the butter using fingertips or two spatulas until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Add the eggs and enough water to form a soft dough. Turn onto lightly floured surface and pat into a 1-inch thick rectangle. Cut into rounds or squares. Fold over twice and brush with milk. Place on an oiled baking sheet. Dust with sugar and bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 15 minutes. Serves 8. C.M. Yockey, Denver, CO. The Household Searchlight - 1941
